description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 3rd; Slot shoulders; Price 2,400 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION When this plain green cloak is worn with the hood drawn up around the head, the wearer can assume the form of a Large tree or shrub, as per the tree shape spell. The cloak is usable once per day, and the wearer may remain in tree form for up to 1 hour. The wearer can return to her normal form as a free action. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, tree shape; Cost 1,200 gp
